title: ManePear's God Armor
description: This plugin adds the armor from ManePear's video:
body:
# Plugin Info

**Adds the custom armor from ManePear's videos:**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/UWHELvwQG6A" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## COMMANDS
/itus give - Gives the user all the armor pieces
/itus reload - Reloads the config.yml

## Config.yml
particles:
  enabled: true
  type: FLAME
  amount: 5
  
helmet:
  name: "§6Itus Helmet"
  effects:
    HERO_OF_THE_VILLAGE: 10
    
chestplate:
  name: "§6Itus Chestplate"
  effects:
    RESISTANCE: 1
    FIRE_RESISTANCE: 0
    
leggings:
  name: "§6Itus Leggings"
  effects:
    STRENGTH: 2
    REGENERATION: 1
    
boots:
  name: "§6Itus Boots"
  effects:
    SPEED: 2
    DOLPHINS_GRACE: 1

## HOW TO GET
There is no way to get the armor in survival, the admins should choose how to give out the armor pieces.

**If you need support, please contact me on my discord server
For custom plugins, make a ticket on my discord server :D**
